description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: build-msvc on windows-latest, build-gcc on ubuntu-latest, and build-appleclang on macos-latest. Each job checks out the repository, caches Conan dependencies, installs required tools and dependencies, configures and builds the project with CMake and Ninja, runs tests with CTest, and uploads the build to itch.io if a BUTLER_API_KEY secret is available.
